title: selaginella dosedlae
intro: Selaginella dosedlae, also known as the spiny spleenwort or resurrection fern, is a type of resurrection fern, a genus of vascular plants that are often found in tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Selaginella dosedlae include its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce swelling and pain, and its antioxidant properties, which can help protect the body from free radicals and oxidative stress. Selaginella dosedlae can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it is also used in traditional medicine to create salves and ointments for topical application.
